## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration and knowledge sharing between Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) and Alexander Kehaya (kehaya.com) in AI-powered content creation and distribution.](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both have extensive experience in content creation, AI, and open-source projects](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Alex runs a successful podcast (The Index) and is looking to scale/automate content production](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Marcel's company (fwd.digital) has developed AI-powered content creation tools and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Shared experiences with personal/professional challenges and the importance of vulnerability](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Mutual interest in further discussions and potential collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1720.0)

## Topics

### Personal Background and Current Projects

  - [Alex: Based in Ojai, CA; runs ABK Labs (Solana ecosystem), podcast "The Index"](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Marcel: Originally from Brazil, worked at IBM, HP, HashiCorp; now runs fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=667.0)
  - [Both have experience with content creation, AI, and open-source projects](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Alex's podcast: 19k subscribers, 175k views in 20 days, $20k/month revenue](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
  - [Marcel's company: Recently hit $4M ARR, 30 clients including Reddit and Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)

### Content Creation Processes and Challenges

  - [Alex developed a "factory system" for podcast production](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [Seeking AI automation for content distribution, editing, and clip generation](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Current reliance on human editors for "shipping complete thoughts"](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Marcel's company automates content creation with AI + human editors in the loop](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Research agents can scrape 1000+ sources for article outlines](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)

### Personal Journeys and Shared Experiences

  - [Both faced significant personal and professional challenges](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Alex: Loss of a child, wife on bed rest, managing multiple businesses](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [Marcel: Fired twice from startups, IVF journey, anxiety issues](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1122.0)
  - [Emphasis on vulnerability and authentic connections in business relationships](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)

### AI and Open Source Initiatives

  - [Alex's focus on open-source software and funding engineers](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [Marcel's experience with AI conferences and workshops](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=881.0)
  - [Shared interest in AI's potential to accelerate development and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)

### Future Collaboration and Next Steps

  - [Alex invited Marcel to appear on his podcast(s)](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Marcel offered to demo fwd.digital's AI workflow tools](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Potential for knowledge sharing and mutual benefit in AI-powered content creation](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to text Alex when available for a follow-up call](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Schedule podcast appearance(s) for Marcel on Alex's shows](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [Alex to send Marcel raw, unedited podcast episode for insights](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [Arrange demo of fwd.digital's AI workflow tools](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1540.0)
  - [Explore potential use cases for fwd.digital's tools in Alex's content production](https://fathom.video/share/ocV_oJYi-1z4iKs6aapvNgiWp9ZMjTxK?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
